results.expected: Valid DOCX submission creates an attempt and triggers an AI review.
results.actual: Attempt cmrkorby0000dnb8i865ca657 created with AI review cmrkorhby000pnb8izlckbmxn in status COMPLETED.

results.expected: Review status should move through QUEUED -> PROCESSING -> COMPLETED.
Duplicate submit does not create duplicate review jobs.
results.actual: Submission idempotent=true; review job count for attempt=1.

results.expected: Every rerun creates a new immutable AI review version and preserves older versions.
Resubmission creates a new immutable AI review version.
results.actual: Resubmission created attempt cmrkos0gm0024nb8izmctheke with review version 3; previousReviewId=cmrkorsuv001fnb8ikj0cpi6n; previousAttemptId=cmrkorby0000dnb8i865ca657.

results.expected: Wrong extension is rejected and AI review does not run.
results.actual: Status=400; error=Executable attachment .exe is not allowed.

results.expected: MIME mismatch is rejected and AI review does not run.
results.actual: Status=400; error=File mime-mismatch.docx failed MIME validation for .docx.

results.expected: Oversized file is rejected and AI review does not run.
results.actual: Status=400; error=File oversized.docx exceeds the maximum allowed size.

results.expected: Corrupted DOCX is rejected and AI review does not run.
results.actual: Rejected with error File corrupted.docx is corrupted or unreadable: Can't find end of central directory : is this a zip file ? If it is, see https://stuk.github.io/jszip/documentation/howto/read_zip.html.

results.expected: Below minimum word count is rejected before AI runs.
results.actual: Rejected at submit time with Word count 17 is below the minimum 30..

results.expected: Above maximum word count is rejected before AI runs.
results.actual: Rejected at submit time with Word count 306 exceeds the maximum 250..

results.expected: Closed assignment rejects submission and AI review does not run.
results.actual: Status=400; error=Coursework publication is not open for new submissions.

results.expected: Attempt-limit exceeded is rejected and AI review does not run.
results.actual: First=201; second=400; secondError=Maximum attempts reached for this coursework.
Status=403; error=Student is not a target for this coursework publication.

results.expected: Student sees only released AI review summary and no internal source matches.
results.actual: Released review exists in DB with 0 internal source matches attached to storage; runtime filtering is enforced in student serialization.
